message:
fix(security): length-prefix hash inputs and remove needless borrows in 12 files

Replace pipe/colon-delimited hash inputs with length-prefixed encoding
to prevent delimiter-collision attacks (bd-154d). Also fix clippy
needless_borrows_for_generic_args warnings by removing unnecessary &
before .to_le_bytes() calls.

Files with length-prefix conversion: marker_stream, mitigation_synthesis,
compatibility_gate, proof_executor, certification, reputation,
verifier_toolkit.

Files with clippy borrow fix only: claim_compiler, lease_coordinator,
migration_pipeline, decision_receipt, interface_hash.

5597 tests pass, 0 failures, clippy -D warnings clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
